use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING ANDROGEN RESPONSIVE/MEDIATED CONDITION IN MAMMAL BY ADMIN A SAFE, EFFECTIVE AMOUNT OF DUTASTERIDE OR PHARMACEUTICALLY ACCEPTABLE DERIVATIVE THEREOF..CONDITIONS INCLUDE BENIGN PROSTATIC HYPERTROPHY
METHOD OF INHIBITING 5 ALPHA TESTOSTERONE REDUCTASE ENZYME WITH DUTASTERIDE OR ITS DERIVATIVE AND TREATING ANDROGEN RESPONSIVE/MEDIATED DISEASE INCLUDING BENIGN PROSTATIC HYPERPLASIA

indications.text:
1.1 Monotherapy
AVODART® (dutasteride) Soft Gelatin Capsules are indicated for the treatment of
symptomatic benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) in men with an enlarged prostate to:
 improve symptoms,
 reduce the risk of acute urinary retention (AUR), and
 reduce the risk of the need for BPH-relate...

AVODART is indicated for the treatment of symptomatic benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH)
in men with an enlarged prostate to:
• Improve symptoms
• Reduce the risk of acute urinary retention
• Reduce the risk of the need for BPH-related surgery
